## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Change Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Test-only change
- [ ] Build/CI/Tooling

## Validation

- [ ] `./gradlew test lint assembleDebug`
- [ ] Additional local checks (if any) are listed below.

## Additional Checks

- [ ] No live credentials, cookies, tokens, or customer-identifying data are included.
- [ ] Fixtures and captures are sanitized.
- [ ] Docs were updated when behavior or contracts changed.
- [ ] Commits are signed off (`git commit -s`).

## Linked Issues

- Closes #
